dimension_scores.details: 7,560 of 18,000 CIs have all required fields populated. Major gaps in owner, support_group, and environment fields.
No discovery validation — scoring on internal consistency only. 14,760 CIs have never been validated by automated discovery.
1,200 CIs not updated in 180+ days. 2,800 CIs stale for 90-180 days. Only 32% of CIs updated in last 30 days.
12,420 CIs with no relationships mapped (69%). 2,800 servers with no application mapping. 68% of integrations undocumented.
Only Infrastructure layer populated. No Business Service layer. No Business Application layer. No Technical Service layer.
810 CIs in generic cmdb_ci class. 450 servers classified as cmdb_ci_computer without subclass. Mixed naming conventions.
4,100 orphaned CIs with zero relationships. 23% of total CI population is orphaned.
340 potential duplicate CIs detected. Primary causes: manual entry without dedup checks, multiple discovery sources.

findings.title: 12,420 CIs have no service dependencies mapped (69%)
findings.description: The majority of the CMDB has no relationship data. Without relationships, impact analysis, change collision detection, and service mapping are impossible. This is the single largest gap in the CMDB.
findings.remediation: Deploy automated discovery and relationship mapping. Prioritize servers and applications. Use Pathfinder behavioral observation to validate and create relationships.

findings.title: 14,760 CIs have no discovery validation (82%)
findings.description: 82% of CIs have never been validated by an automated discovery source. Data was manually entered and has no mechanism for ongoing accuracy verification.
findings.remediation: Deploy ServiceNow Discovery or Pathfinder agents to cover all network segments. Establish validation schedules.

findings.title: CSDM Business Service layer is not populated
findings.description: No Business Services have been defined in the CMDB. This prevents business impact analysis and executive-level service health reporting.
findings.remediation: Workshop with business stakeholders to identify and define Business Services. Map to underlying Technical Services and applications.

findings.title: CSDM Business Application layer is not populated
findings.description: No Business Applications have been defined. Application portfolio management and CSDM compliance require this layer.
findings.remediation: Catalog business applications from existing application inventory. Create Business Application CIs and map to supporting infrastructure.

findings.title: 1,200 CIs not updated in 180+ days
findings.description: These CIs have not been touched in over 6 months. They likely represent decommissioned assets still in the CMDB, or assets outside discovery scope.
findings.remediation: Audit stale CIs against DNS, AD, and network scans. Retire confirmed decommissions. Extend discovery to cover remaining assets.

findings.title: 2,800 servers with no application mapping
findings.description: 67% of servers have no runs_on/hosted_on relationship to any application. Server-to-application mapping is essential for change impact analysis.
findings.remediation: Deploy Pathfinder to observe application traffic on servers. Map observed application processes to CMDB Application CIs.

findings.title: 68% of integrations are undocumented (estimated 262 missing)
findings.description: Only 120 integrations are documented. Based on traffic analysis of similar healthcare organizations, an estimated 382 integrations should exist.
findings.remediation: Use Pathfinder network observation to discover integration patterns. Document discovered integrations as CMDB relationships.

findings.title: CSDM Technical Service layer is not populated
findings.description: No Technical Services have been defined. The CSDM framework requires Technical Services to bridge infrastructure and business services.
findings.remediation: Define Technical Services based on application clusters and infrastructure dependencies. Use Contour to automate service model generation.

findings.title: 890 CIs have IP addresses that don't resolve in DNS
findings.description: IP addresses stored in CMDB do not match current DNS records. These CIs may have been re-IPed, decommissioned, or incorrectly entered.
findings.remediation: Cross-reference CMDB IPs with DNS and DHCP records. Update or retire CIs with invalid IPs. Enable automated IP reconciliation.

findings.title: 560 CIs have hostnames not found in Active Directory
findings.description: Hostnames in CMDB do not match any Active Directory computer objects. These may be stale records or naming convention mismatches.
findings.remediation: Reconcile CMDB hostnames against AD. Standardize naming conventions. Retire CIs with no matching AD object.

findings.title: 340 servers running end-of-life operating systems
findings.description: Servers are running Windows Server 2012 R2, RHEL 6, or other EOL operating systems per CMDB data. These represent security and compliance risk.
findings.remediation: Validate OS versions via discovery. Create migration plan for EOL systems. Track remediation through change management.

findings.title: 45 Tier 1 applications have zero dependencies mapped
findings.description: Business-critical applications classified as Tier 1 have no upstream or downstream dependencies in the CMDB. Impact analysis for these applications is blind.
findings.remediation: Priority mapping engagement for Tier 1 applications. Deploy Pathfinder for automated dependency discovery on critical app infrastructure.

findings.title: 78 servers share serial numbers with other CIs
findings.description: Multiple CI records reference the same serial number, indicating duplicate records or data entry errors.
findings.remediation: Dedup analysis to identify true duplicates vs data entry errors. Merge confirmed duplicates. Enable dedup rules in CMDB.

findings.title: 1,860 servers are orphaned (no relationships)
findings.description: Nearly half of all servers exist in the CMDB with zero relationships to applications, services, or support groups.
findings.remediation: Deploy Pathfinder to observe server traffic and automatically discover relationships. Prioritize by server tier.

findings.title: 1,100 servers have blank OS version field
findings.description: Servers exist in CMDB without OS version populated. This prevents vulnerability management, patching, and compliance reporting.
findings.remediation: Enable discovery-based OS version population. Run targeted discovery against servers with blank OS data.

findings.title: 230 CIs marked Operational but not seen by discovery in 365+ days
findings.description: These CIs are flagged as Operational but have not been detected by any discovery source in over a year. They are likely decommissioned.
findings.remediation: Validate each CI against infrastructure records. Retire confirmed decommissions. Deploy Pathfinder for continuous validation.

findings.title: 180 databases have no application relationship
findings.description: Database CIs exist without any relationship to the applications that use them. Database impact analysis is impossible.
findings.remediation: Map databases to applications using connection string analysis and Pathfinder traffic observation.

findings.title: 420 CIs reference locations that do not exist in cmn_location
findings.description: CI location fields reference location records that have been deleted or never existed. Location-based reporting and compliance are compromised.
findings.remediation: Clean up orphaned location references. Standardize location taxonomy. Enable location validation rules.

findings.title: Zero Service Offerings defined in CSDM
findings.description: The Service Offering layer of CSDM is completely empty. This prevents service catalog alignment with CSDM.
findings.remediation: Define Service Offerings for each Business Service. Align with service catalog entries.

findings.title: 520 network devices with no connections mapped
findings.description: Network switches, routers, and firewalls have no network connection relationships. Network topology is invisible in CMDB.
findings.remediation: Enable SNMP-based network discovery. Use Pathfinder to supplement with observed traffic patterns.

findings.title: 780 servers have RAM or CPU values of zero
findings.description: Hardware specification fields are populated with zero values, indicating incomplete discovery or manual entry errors.
findings.remediation: Re-run discovery with credential validation. Ensure WMI/SSH credentials are current for all server segments.

findings.title: 85 Retired CIs have open incidents assigned
findings.description: CIs marked as Retired still have active incidents. Either the CI status is wrong or the incidents need reassignment.
findings.remediation: Audit each case: validate CI status and reassign incidents to correct CIs. Implement CI status change workflow.

findings.title: 34 load balancers with no pool member relationships
findings.description: Load balancer CIs have no relationships to their pool members. Load balancer impact analysis is impossible.
findings.remediation: Import load balancer pool configurations. Use Pathfinder to validate actual traffic distribution.

findings.title: 310 CIs in production subnet with non-production environment tag
findings.description: CIs are deployed in production network segments but tagged as Development or Test. This creates risk management blind spots.
findings.remediation: Cross-reference CMDB environment tags with network segment data. Correct environment classifications.

findings.title: 420 database CIs with zero relationships
findings.description: Database instances exist in isolation with no relationship to servers, applications, or services.
findings.remediation: Map databases to hosting servers and consuming applications. Pathfinder can observe database connection traffic.

findings.title: 1,400 CIs have non-standard vendor/manufacturer entries
findings.description: Vendor names are inconsistent (e.g., 'HP', 'Hewlett-Packard', 'Hewlett Packard Enterprise', 'HPE'). This breaks reporting and license management.
findings.remediation: Implement vendor name normalization rules. Clean existing data using transformation maps.

findings.title: Discovery schedules not running for 3 network segments
findings.description: Three discovery schedules covering 2,400 CIs have not executed successfully in 60+ days. New assets are not being discovered.
findings.remediation: Investigate discovery schedule failures. Validate MID Server health and credentials. Restart failed schedules.

findings.title: 12 clusters have no member relationships
findings.description: Cluster CIs (Windows failover, VMware, database clusters) have no member server relationships mapped.
findings.remediation: Map cluster membership relationships. Enable cluster-aware discovery patterns.

findings.title: 145 CIs have attributes inconsistent with their class
findings.description: CIs are classified in one class but have attributes suggesting a different class (e.g., a Linux server classified as Windows).
findings.remediation: Reclassify CIs based on discovered attributes. Implement classification validation rules.

findings.title: 4,100 orphaned CIs with zero relationships (23%)
findings.description: 23% of the total CI population has no relationships to any other CI, group, or service. These CIs provide no value for impact analysis.
findings.remediation: Prioritize orphan resolution by CI class and tier. Deploy automated relationship discovery.

findings.title: 6,300 CIs missing owner field (35%)
findings.description: Over a third of CIs have no owner assigned. Ownership is required for change approval routing and accountability.
findings.remediation: Implement ownership assignment workflows. Auto-assign owners based on support group and location.

findings.title: 4,500 CIs missing support_group field (25%)
findings.description: 25% of CIs have no support group assigned. Incident routing and escalation depend on this field.
findings.remediation: Map CIs to support groups based on class, location, and application ownership. Bulk-update via import sets.

findings.title: 2,800 CIs not updated in 90-180 days
findings.description: These CIs are going stale but haven't crossed the critical 180-day threshold. Without intervention, they will become unreliable.
findings.remediation: Extend discovery coverage to these CIs. Implement stale CI alerting at the 60-day mark.

findings.title: 340 potential duplicate CIs detected
findings.description: Matching analysis found 340 CI pairs with high similarity scores across name, serial number, IP, and MAC address.
findings.remediation: Review and merge confirmed duplicates. Enable CMDB deduplication rules. Configure IRE identification rules.

findings.title: 2,100 CIs missing environment field
findings.description: Environment (Production, Dev, Test, etc.) is not populated. This prevents environment-based change policies and risk assessment.
findings.remediation: Derive environment from network segment, naming convention, and location. Bulk-update using transformation maps.

findings.title: 810 CIs classified as generic cmdb_ci
findings.description: These CIs are in the base cmdb_ci class instead of a specific subclass. They lack class-specific attributes and discovery rules.
findings.remediation: Reclassify CIs based on discovered attributes. Implement classification rules in the IRE.

findings.title: 450 servers classified as cmdb_ci_computer without proper subclass
findings.description: Servers are in the generic computer class instead of cmdb_ci_server, cmdb_ci_linux_server, or cmdb_ci_win_server.
findings.remediation: Reclassify based on OS type. Enable OS-based classification rules in discovery.

findings.title: 1,800 servers missing IP address
findings.description: Servers without IP addresses cannot be matched to discovery results, network scans, or vulnerability data.
findings.remediation: Run discovery with IP reconciliation enabled. Cross-reference with DHCP and DNS records.

findings.title: 620 virtual machines with no host relationship
findings.description: Virtual machines exist without a hosted_on relationship to their hypervisor host. VM sprawl and capacity planning are affected.
findings.remediation: Enable VMware/Hyper-V discovery patterns. Map VMs to hosts using vCenter/SCVMM integration.

findings.title: 2,300 hardware CIs missing manufacturer field
findings.description: Hardware CIs without manufacturer data break warranty tracking, lifecycle management, and asset reporting.
findings.remediation: Populate manufacturer from discovery (WMI/BIOS). Normalize vendor names using data quality rules.

findings.title: 510 CIs with conflicting operational status and install status
findings.description: CIs have operational_status and install_status values that contradict each other (e.g., operational + retired).
findings.remediation: Define status combination rules. Clean up conflicting records. Implement validation business rules.

findings.title: 890 application CIs with zero relationships
findings.description: Application CIs exist in isolation with no relationship to servers, databases, or services.
findings.remediation: Map applications to infrastructure using Pathfinder application discovery.

findings.title: 580 hardware assets with expired warranty and no replacement plan
findings.description: Assets are running past warranty with no associated change request or project for replacement.
findings.remediation: Generate hardware lifecycle report. Create replacement project tasks for out-of-warranty assets.

findings.title: 28 circular dependency relationships detected
findings.description: CI relationships form circular loops (A depends on B, B depends on A). This breaks impact analysis traversal.
findings.remediation: Identify and break circular dependencies. Correct relationship direction and type.

findings.title: 1,500 servers missing DNS name / FQDN
findings.description: Servers without FQDN cannot be correlated with monitoring, logging, and vulnerability scan data.
findings.remediation: Enable DNS reconciliation in discovery. Populate FQDN from reverse DNS lookups.

findings.title: 92 IP address collisions across CIs
findings.description: Multiple CIs share the same IP address (excluding known shared IPs like load balancers). Indicates stale records or data errors.
findings.remediation: Investigate IP collisions. Retire stale CIs. Implement IP uniqueness validation rules.

findings.title: Zero Application Services defined in CSDM
findings.description: Application Services (auto-generated from service mapping) are not present. CSDM Technical Service layer is incomplete.
findings.remediation: Deploy service mapping to automatically generate Application Services from discovered dependencies.

findings.title: 380 network devices with zero relationships
findings.description: Network infrastructure CIs have no connections to other devices or servers.
findings.remediation: Enable SNMP/LLDP-based network discovery. Map layer 2/3 topology.

findings.title: 180 duplicate hostname entries
findings.description: Multiple CIs share the same hostname. Likely caused by multiple discovery sources or manual entry.
findings.remediation: Merge duplicate records. Configure IRE identification rules to prevent future duplicates.

findings.title: 1,900 hardware CIs missing serial number
findings.description: Serial numbers are essential for warranty, asset lifecycle, and vendor support lookups.
findings.remediation: Re-run discovery with BIOS/WMI credential validation. Populate from vendor asset records.

findings.title: 240 storage volumes with no server relationship
findings.description: Storage volumes exist without relationship to consuming servers. Storage impact analysis is incomplete.
findings.remediation: Map storage to servers using LUN mapping data. Enable storage discovery patterns.

findings.title: 670 CIs reference non-existent model records
findings.description: The model_id field points to model records that have been deleted. Model-based reporting and HAM workflows break.
findings.remediation: Clean up orphaned model references. Recreate missing model records from vendor catalogs.

findings.title: 1,400 software CIs with versions 2+ major releases behind
findings.description: Software installations tracked in CMDB are significantly outdated. May represent patching gaps or stale data.
findings.remediation: Validate software versions via discovery. Flag genuinely outdated software for patching. Retire stale records.

findings.title: 156 relationships using deprecated relationship types
findings.description: CI relationships use relationship types that have been deprecated or replaced in current ServiceNow releases.
findings.remediation: Migrate relationships to current types. Update integration scripts that create relationships.

findings.title: 3,200 CIs missing category/subcategory
findings.description: Category and subcategory fields are blank, preventing categorization-based reporting and filtering.
findings.remediation: Derive category from CI class and attributes. Bulk-update using class-to-category mapping.

findings.title: 550 storage CIs with zero relationships
findings.description: Storage devices and volumes are isolated in the CMDB with no connections to servers or applications.
findings.remediation: Enable storage discovery. Map SAN/NAS relationships to consuming servers.

findings.title: 1,250 CIs assigned to inactive/terminated users
findings.description: CIs reference users who are no longer active in the organization. Ownership and assignment data is stale.
findings.remediation: Cross-reference CI assignments with HR/AD data. Reassign to current owners or support groups.

findings.title: 2,200 CIs violate naming convention standards
findings.description: CI names don't follow any consistent pattern. Mixed formats: FQDN, short hostname, asset tags, descriptions.
findings.remediation: Define and enforce naming conventions. Standardize CI names using transformation maps.

findings.title: 320 leased assets past lease end date with no action
findings.description: Leased hardware assets are past their lease expiration with no return, purchase, or renewal record.
findings.remediation: Audit expired leases. Process returns, purchases, or renewals. Implement lease expiration alerting.

findings.title: 85 duplicate MAC address entries
findings.description: Multiple CIs share the same MAC address. Unless these are known virtual MAC addresses, they indicate duplicates.
findings.remediation: Investigate and merge confirmed duplicates. Configure MAC-based IRE dedup rules.

findings.title: 3,800 CIs missing location field
findings.description: Location data is essential for compliance, disaster recovery planning, and on-site support routing.
findings.remediation: Populate location from subnet-to-site mapping. Use discovery data to determine physical location.

findings.title: 95 middleware CIs with no upstream or downstream dependencies
findings.description: Middleware components (WebSphere, Tomcat, IIS) have no relationships to applications or databases.
findings.remediation: Deploy application dependency mapping. Use Pathfinder to observe middleware traffic patterns.

findings.title: 340 CIs with conflicting data from multiple discovery sources
findings.description: Multiple discovery sources report different values for the same CI attributes. No reconciliation rules are in place.
findings.remediation: Configure data source priority in IRE. Define authoritative source per attribute. Enable reconciliation rules.

findings.title: Mixed naming conventions across CI classes
findings.description: No consistent naming standard exists. Some CIs use FQDN, others use short names, asset tags, or descriptions.
findings.remediation: Define naming convention policy. Create transformation maps to standardize names.

findings.title: 4,200 CIs missing install date
findings.description: Install date is blank, preventing age-based lifecycle reporting and refresh planning.
findings.remediation: Populate from discovery data, purchase records, or asset import history.

findings.title: 2,800 hardware CIs missing asset tag
findings.description: Asset tags are required for physical inventory and financial reconciliation.
findings.remediation: Cross-reference with financial asset system. Assign asset tags during next physical inventory.

findings.title: 5,400 CIs missing department assignment
findings.description: Department field is blank, preventing cost allocation and departmental reporting.
findings.remediation: Derive department from owner, support group, or application mapping.

findings.title: 3,200 CIs not updated in 30-90 days
findings.description: These CIs are beginning to go stale. Without regular discovery updates, accuracy will degrade.
findings.remediation: Review discovery schedules. Ensure all CI segments are covered by regular discovery runs.

findings.title: 480 relationships using generic 'Depends on' without specificity
findings.description: Relationships are typed as generic 'Depends on::Used by' instead of specific types like 'Runs on::Runs' or 'Hosted on::Hosts'.
findings.remediation: Reclassify relationships to specific types. Update integration scripts to use correct types.

findings.title: 120 printers classified as servers
findings.description: Network printers have been incorrectly classified as servers, inflating server counts.
findings.remediation: Reclassify based on SNMP SysDescr. Enable printer discovery classification rules.

findings.title: 75 probable duplicate CIs by serial number fuzzy match
findings.description: CIs have very similar serial numbers differing by 1-2 characters, suggesting typos during manual entry.
findings.remediation: Review probable duplicates. Merge confirmed matches. Enable serial number validation.

findings.title: 950 CIs with non-standard OS name formatting
findings.description: OS names are entered inconsistently (e.g., 'Win2019', 'Windows Server 2019', 'Microsoft Windows Server 2019 Standard').
findings.remediation: Standardize OS name using normalization rules. Configure discovery to use canonical names.

findings.title: Infrastructure layer only 40% CSDM compliant
findings.description: While the infrastructure layer exists, only 40% of CIs have the required CSDM attributes populated.
findings.remediation: Populate CSDM-required fields for infrastructure CIs. Prioritize by CI tier.

findings.title: 280 printer CIs with zero relationships
findings.description: Printers are not linked to locations, support groups, or cost centers.
findings.remediation: Map printers to locations and support groups based on IP subnet.

findings.title: 1,600 hardware CIs missing warranty expiration
findings.description: Warranty dates are not populated, preventing proactive hardware lifecycle management.
findings.remediation: Import warranty data from vendor portals. Integrate with vendor APIs for auto-population.

findings.title: 210 CIs with invalid MAC address format
findings.description: MAC addresses are stored in inconsistent formats or contain invalid characters.
findings.remediation: Standardize MAC address format. Implement format validation on CI form.

findings.title: 6 subnets not covered by any discovery schedule
findings.description: Network segments exist that are not included in any discovery schedule. Assets on these subnets are invisible.
findings.remediation: Create discovery schedules for uncovered subnets. Validate MID Server access to these segments.

findings.title: 1,200 CIs without containment relationships
findings.description: Physical containment (rack, enclosure, datacenter) is not mapped for most hardware CIs.
findings.remediation: Map physical containment from datacenter management tools. Integrate with DCIM if available.

findings.title: 8,200 CIs missing cost center
findings.description: Cost center assignment is blank for the majority of CIs. Financial reporting and chargeback are impossible.
findings.remediation: Map cost centers from application ownership and department. Integrate with financial system.

findings.title: 85 appliances classified generically
findings.description: Network appliances (firewalls, IDS/IPS, WAF) are classified as generic cmdb_ci_netgear instead of specific subclasses.
findings.remediation: Reclassify based on SNMP/SSH discovery data. Create proper appliance CI classes.

findings.title: 48 CIs with identical name and location
findings.description: CIs share both name and location, strongly suggesting they are duplicates.
findings.remediation: Review and merge confirmed duplicates. Strengthen IRE identification rules.

findings.title: 380 CIs assigned to deleted or inactive support groups
findings.description: Support group references point to groups that no longer exist. Incident routing will fail.
findings.remediation: Reassign CIs to active support groups. Implement group deletion validation.

findings.title: 45 backup systems with no client relationships
findings.description: Backup infrastructure CIs have no relationships to the systems they protect.
findings.remediation: Map backup client relationships. Import from backup management console.

findings.title: 1,100 CIs with blank short description
findings.description: Short description provides context for CIs. Blank descriptions make it difficult to identify CIs in lists and reports.
findings.remediation: Auto-generate descriptions from CI class, name, and key attributes.

findings.title: 42 SSL certificates expiring within 30 days
findings.description: CMDB tracks SSL certificates that are about to expire. If not renewed, service outages will occur.
findings.remediation: Review and renew expiring certificates. Implement certificate lifecycle monitoring.

findings.title: 350 virtual machine CIs with zero relationships
findings.description: VMs exist in CMDB without relationship to their host or any application.
findings.remediation: Re-run VMware/Hyper-V discovery. Map VMs to hosts and applications.

findings.title: 65 ESXi hosts classified as regular servers
findings.description: VMware ESXi hosts are classified as cmdb_ci_server instead of cmdb_ci_esx_server, preventing hypervisor-specific workflows.
findings.remediation: Reclassify as cmdb_ci_esx_server. Enable VMware-specific discovery classification.

findings.title: 190 CIs with impossible rack unit positions
findings.description: Rack unit positions exceed rack capacity or overlap with other CIs in the same rack.
findings.remediation: Validate rack positions against rack capacity. Correct overlapping assignments.

findings.title: 45 CIs with blank sys_class_name
findings.description: CIs without sys_class_name cannot be properly managed, reported on, or included in class-based workflows.
findings.remediation: Determine correct class from attributes. Set sys_class_name appropriately.

findings.title: 150 monitoring alerts reference CIs not in CMDB
findings.description: Monitoring tools generate alerts for hosts that don't have a matching CI record.
findings.remediation: Create missing CIs. Improve CI-to-monitoring correlation using FQDN and IP matching.

findings.title: 38 application CIs with identical names
findings.description: Multiple application CIs share the exact same name, likely representing the same application entered multiple times.
findings.remediation: Review and merge duplicates. Implement application naming standards.

findings.title: No Information Objects defined in CSDM
findings.description: CSDM Information Objects (databases, data stores) are not mapped, preventing data governance alignment.
findings.remediation: Define Information Objects from database inventory. Map to Technical Services.

findings.title: 420 servers with CPU count of zero
findings.description: Server CIs report zero CPUs, indicating failed or incomplete discovery.
findings.remediation: Re-run discovery with corrected credentials. Validate WMI/SSH access.

findings.title: 280 configuration file CIs not updated in 60+ days
findings.description: Configuration file tracking records are stale. Config drift detection is unreliable.
findings.remediation: Enable configuration file monitoring. Schedule regular configuration audits.

findings.title: 7,500 CIs without managed_by reference
findings.description: The managed_by field is blank, preventing management responsibility tracking.
findings.remediation: Derive managed_by from support group assignments. Implement as required field for new CIs.

findings.title: 34 DNS records in CMDB with no server relationship
findings.description: DNS CIs are not linked to the servers they resolve to.
findings.remediation: Map DNS to server CIs using A/AAAA record data.

findings.title: 1,200 software installation CIs orphaned
findings.description: Software installations exist without relationship to the host they're installed on.
findings.remediation: Map software to hosts via discovery. Clean up orphaned records.

findings.title: 380 Linux servers without distribution classification
findings.description: Linux servers are classified as cmdb_ci_linux_server but lack distribution-specific subclass (RHEL, Ubuntu, etc.).
findings.remediation: Populate OS details from discovery. Enable distribution-based classification.

findings.title: 620 CIs where subcategory doesn't match category
findings.description: Subcategory values are inconsistent with their parent category, breaking hierarchical reporting.
findings.remediation: Validate and correct category/subcategory alignment. Implement cascading validation.

findings.title: 900 CIs missing sys_domain assignment
findings.description: CIs without domain assignment cannot be properly scoped in a domain-separated instance.
findings.remediation: Assign domains based on CI location and support group. Validate against domain separation rules.

findings.title: 12,000 CIs with blank comments/notes field
findings.description: The comments field provides operational context. While not critical, it aids troubleshooting.
findings.remediation: Low priority. Consider auto-populating from change records or incident history.

findings.title: 3,400 hardware CIs missing purchase date
findings.description: Purchase date is blank, preventing age-based depreciation and refresh planning.
findings.remediation: Import purchase dates from procurement system or vendor records.

findings.title: 2,600 CIs with less than 30% of class-specific attributes populated
findings.description: CIs are correctly classified but most class-specific attributes are blank.
findings.remediation: Prioritize attribute population for high-value CIs. Use discovery to auto-populate.

findings.title: No CI audit history beyond 90 days retained
findings.description: CI change history is not retained beyond 90 days, limiting trend analysis.
findings.remediation: Extend audit retention policy. Archive audit records for historical analysis.

findings.title: 120 soft-match duplicate candidates requiring review
findings.description: Fuzzy matching identified potential duplicates that need manual review to confirm or dismiss.
findings.remediation: Schedule periodic duplicate review sessions. Enable automated soft-match alerts.

findings.title: 850 CIs with placeholder descriptions like 'TBD' or 'N/A'
findings.description: Descriptions contain placeholder text instead of meaningful information.
findings.remediation: Replace placeholders with auto-generated descriptions from CI attributes.

findings.title: 210 unidirectional relationships that should be bidirectional
findings.description: Some relationship types are missing their reverse direction, breaking traversal in one direction.
findings.remediation: Create missing reverse relationships. Validate relationship type configuration.

findings.title: 180 peripheral device CIs orphaned
findings.description: Monitors, docking stations, and other peripherals have no relationship to their users or workstations.
findings.remediation: Map peripherals to workstations. Consider excluding low-value peripherals from CMDB.

findings.title: No CI lifecycle stages defined per CSDM
findings.description: CSDM recommends defined lifecycle stages for CIs. Currently using only default ServiceNow states.
findings.remediation: Define CSDM-aligned lifecycle stages. Map existing statuses to new lifecycle model.

findings.title: 1,800 CIs with no contract reference
findings.description: CIs are not linked to support or maintenance contracts.
findings.remediation: Map CIs to contracts based on vendor and product. Integrate with contract management.

findings.title: IPv6 addresses not tracked for dual-stack hosts
findings.description: Dual-stack hosts only have IPv4 recorded. IPv6 addresses are missing from CMDB.
findings.remediation: Enable IPv6 collection in discovery. Add IPv6 to CI forms.

findings.title: No automated CI refresh/validation schedule exists
findings.description: There is no process to periodically validate CMDB data quality. Data quality degrades over time.
findings.remediation: Implement scheduled health checks using Bearing continuous monitoring.

findings.title: Medical IoT devices not tracked in CMDB
findings.description: Connected medical devices (infusion pumps, monitors) are not in the CMDB despite being network-connected.
findings.remediation: Extend CMDB scope to include medical IoT. Create appropriate CI classes. Deploy Pathfinder for IoT discovery.

findings.title: No disaster recovery pairs documented in CMDB
findings.description: DR relationships between production and DR sites are not mapped, preventing DR impact analysis.
findings.remediation: Document DR pairs as CMDB relationships. Use specific DR relationship types.

findings.title: 9,800 CIs missing criticality/tier assignment
findings.description: Criticality/tier is blank, preventing prioritization of CIs for incident response and change management.
findings.remediation: Derive criticality from application tier and business service mapping.

findings.title: 34 probable duplicate CIs by IP similarity in same subnet
findings.description: CIs in the same subnet with very similar IPs and names may be duplicates.
findings.remediation: Review and validate. May be legitimate (e.g., VM migration). Dismiss or merge.

findings.title: 340 CIs with timezone data inconsistent with location
findings.description: CI timezone values don't match the timezone of their assigned location.
findings.remediation: Correct timezone based on location. Implement timezone-location validation.

findings.title: 420 endpoint/workstation CIs orphaned
findings.description: Workstations and laptops have no relationship to users or departments.
findings.remediation: Map endpoints to users via AD integration. Update assigned_to from logon data.

findings.title: No CMDB governance board or data steward program
findings.description: There is no formal governance structure for CMDB data quality ownership and accountability.
findings.remediation: Establish CMDB governance board. Appoint data stewards per CI class. Define quality KPIs.

findings.title: Cloud resources not properly classified
findings.description: AWS/Azure resources are tracked but not using ServiceNow's native cloud CI classes.
findings.remediation: Migrate cloud CIs to native classes. Enable cloud discovery integration.

findings.title: 18 SLA definitions with no associated CI or service
findings.description: SLAs exist without being linked to the CIs or services they protect.
findings.remediation: Link SLAs to relevant CIs and services. Validate SLA coverage.

findings.title: 2,400 CIs missing company field
findings.description: Company assignment is blank, preventing multi-company reporting.
findings.remediation: Populate company from domain and organizational hierarchy.

findings.title: 95 CIs where model category doesn't match CI class
findings.description: The model's category doesn't align with the CI class, causing reporting inconsistencies.
findings.remediation: Align model categories with CI classes. Implement validation rules.

findings.title: No CSDM design blueprint or target architecture documented
findings.description: There is no documented target state for CSDM adoption, making it difficult to measure progress.
findings.remediation: Create CSDM adoption roadmap. Define target state for each CSDM layer.

findings.title: 5,200 CIs with no discovery_source populated
findings.description: The discovery_source field is blank, making it impossible to trace data provenance.
findings.remediation: Tag CIs with discovery source. Implement source tagging in import sets and discovery.

findings.title: No CMDB health baseline measurement schedule
findings.description: Health assessments are not run on a regular schedule. There is no trend data.
findings.remediation: Implement Bearing continuous monitoring. Schedule monthly assessments.

findings.title: No CMDB deduplication rules configured
findings.description: IRE deduplication rules are not configured, allowing duplicates to be created freely.
findings.remediation: Configure IRE identification and reconciliation rules for each CI class.

findings.title: Container workloads not tracked in CMDB
findings.description: Kubernetes pods and containers are not represented in the CMDB despite running production workloads.
findings.remediation: Evaluate container discovery. Implement Kubernetes integration for CMDB.

findings.title: 85 IP network CIs orphaned
findings.description: IP network/subnet CIs have no relationship to routers, switches, or servers.
findings.remediation: Map networks to gateway devices and connected hosts.

findings.title: 280 CIs where CMDB status and ITAM status disagree
findings.description: Asset management records show a different lifecycle stage than the CMDB operational status.
findings.remediation: Reconcile CMDB and ITAM statuses. Implement bidirectional sync.

findings.title: 6,800 CIs missing floor/room information
findings.description: Physical location details below building level are not populated.
findings.remediation: Populate from facilities management data. Low priority unless required for compliance.

findings.title: 4,100 hardware CIs missing PO number
findings.description: Purchase order references are not populated, preventing financial reconciliation.
findings.remediation: Import from procurement system. Cross-reference with asset tags.

findings.title: Only 35% of change requests reference affected CIs
findings.description: Change requests frequently don't specify which CIs are affected, reducing CMDB value for change analysis.
findings.remediation: Enforce CI association on change requests. Implement CI picker in change form.

findings.title: 3,600 CIs with blank last_discovered field
findings.description: The last_discovered timestamp is null, indicating these CIs have never been touched by discovery.
findings.remediation: Run discovery against these CIs. Extend discovery scope to cover all CI segments.

findings.title: 1,900 servers with unknown patch level
findings.description: Current patch level is not tracked in CMDB, preventing compliance and vulnerability assessment.
findings.remediation: Integrate with patching tools. Enable software discovery for patch tracking.

findings.title: 15 custom CI classes with 5+ levels of inheritance
findings.description: Deeply nested CI class hierarchies add complexity to discovery and reporting.
findings.remediation: Review class hierarchy. Consider flattening overly deep inheritance chains.

findings.title: IRE reconciliation rules not configured for 8 CI classes
findings.description: Identification and Reconciliation Engine rules are missing for several CI classes.
findings.remediation: Configure IRE rules for all actively managed CI classes.

findings.title: CSDM CI-to-Service mapping table is empty
findings.description: The svc_ci_assoc table has no records, meaning no CIs are mapped to services.
findings.remediation: Populate service-CI associations as part of CSDM adoption.

findings.title: Estimated 200+ medical IoT devices not in CMDB
findings.description: Network scans suggest IoT devices on the network that are not tracked in CMDB at all.
findings.remediation: Extend CMDB to include IoT devices. Deploy IoT-aware discovery.

findings.title: 45% of CIs were manually entered (no discovery source)
findings.description: Nearly half of all CIs were manually created, increasing the likelihood of errors.
findings.remediation: Shift to discovery-first approach. Validate manually entered data with discovery.

findings.title: 2,100 CIs in segments with expired discovery credentials
findings.description: Discovery credentials have expired for multiple network segments, preventing any automated validation.
findings.remediation: Renew discovery credentials. Rotate on schedule.

findings.title: Epic EHR has no infrastructure-to-service map
findings.description: The primary EHR system has no CMDB service map. Incident impact analysis for the most critical system is blind.
findings.remediation: Create comprehensive EHR service map including all infrastructure dependencies.

findings.title: 450 production servers with wrong IP in CMDB
findings.description: Production server IPs in CMDB don't match actual IPs from network scan. Monitoring and alerting correlation fails.
findings.remediation: Reconcile CMDB IPs with network scan data.

findings.title: PACS imaging system has zero dependencies mapped
findings.description: The radiology PACS system has no dependencies in CMDB despite being Tier 1 clinical infrastructure.
findings.remediation: Map PACS dependencies.

findings.title: Active Directory integration not syncing for 45 days
findings.description: AD-to-CMDB user sync has been broken, causing stale user assignments across 3,200 CIs.
findings.remediation: Fix AD integration.

findings.title: 890 systems in PHI segments with no compliance tag
findings.description: Systems in network segments carrying PHI have no HIPAA compliance classification.
findings.remediation: Tag all PHI-segment CIs.

findings.title: 12 Tier 1 application servers orphaned
findings.description: Servers hosting Tier 1 apps have zero relationships.
findings.remediation: Priority mapping of Tier 1 server relationships.

findings.title: Laboratory information system has no service map
findings.description: LIS system processes 40,000 lab orders/day but has no CMDB dependency map.
findings.remediation: Create LIS service map.

findings.title: Firewall CI rules reference 340 decommissioned servers
findings.description: Firewall rule CIs reference server CIs that have been retired.
findings.remediation: Audit firewall rules against active CMDB records.

findings.title: Backup configurations for 180 servers outdated by 120+ days
findings.description: Backup system CIs have not been refreshed.
findings.remediation: Sync backup configurations.

findings.title: Pharmacy system has no integration relationships
findings.description: Pharmacy dispensing system documented with zero integrations.
findings.remediation: Map pharmacy system integrations.

findings.title: SAN storage showing 200% capacity utilization
findings.description: Storage CIs report impossible utilization values.
findings.remediation: Re-discover storage capacity.

findings.title: Internal CA certificate inventory 90+ days stale
findings.description: Certificate authority CI records haven't been updated.
findings.remediation: Sync certificate inventory.

findings.title: 15 HL7 interfaces on EHR system undocumented
findings.description: Critical HL7 interfaces have no CMDB relationship records.
findings.remediation: Document all HL7 interfaces.

findings.title: 4 HA clusters have incorrect member counts
findings.description: Cluster CIs show member counts that don't match actual membership.
findings.remediation: Validate cluster membership.

findings.title: 28 production databases orphaned
findings.description: Production database CIs have no relationships.
findings.remediation: Map production databases.

findings.title: Telehealth platform has no dependency map
findings.description: Telehealth platform serving 12,000 monthly visits has zero dependencies.
findings.remediation: Create telehealth service map.

findings.title: VMware licensing data 180+ days stale
findings.description: VMware license CIs have not been updated.
findings.remediation: Sync VMware licensing from vCenter.

findings.title: 2,400 CIs missing MAC address
findings.description: MAC addresses needed for network correlation and dedup.
findings.remediation: Enable MAC collection in discovery.

findings.title: 280 CIs with OS family mismatch
findings.description: OS family field contradicts discovered operating system.
findings.remediation: Correct OS family based on discovery data.

findings.title: 340 middleware CIs with outdated version info
findings.description: Middleware version data is stale.
findings.remediation: Re-discover middleware versions.

findings.title: 8 VPN concentrators with no client relationships
findings.description: VPN infrastructure has no mapped client connections.
findings.remediation: Map VPN client pools.

findings.title: 65 IoT/medical devices classified as servers
findings.description: Medical devices incorrectly classified as servers.
findings.remediation: Reclassify medical devices.

findings.title: 18 cluster CIs orphaned
findings.description: Cluster CIs exist without member relationships.
findings.remediation: Map cluster members.

findings.title: 120 CIs matching on both name and IP
findings.description: Strong duplicate signal.
findings.remediation: Review and merge.

findings.title: 3,600 CIs with no update trail
findings.description: sys_updated_by is null.
findings.remediation: Implement CI update tracking.

findings.title: 45 network devices with default SNMP strings
findings.description: CMDB stores default community strings.
findings.remediation: Validate and update SNMP credentials.

findings.title: 14 SAN switches with no fabric connections
findings.description: SAN fabric topology invisible.
findings.remediation: Map SAN fabric connections.

findings.title: 890 endpoints running outdated Windows 10
findings.description: Endpoint OS versions significantly behind current.
findings.remediation: Validate via SCCM/Intune sync.

findings.title: 180 VMs classified as physical servers
findings.description: VMs in physical server classes.
findings.remediation: Reclassify based on hypervisor discovery.

findings.title: 1,400 CIs with blank operational_status
findings.description: Operational status essential for CI filtering.
findings.remediation: Derive from discovery data.

findings.title: 210 CIs assigned to wrong datacenter
findings.description: CIs mapped to wrong datacenter based on subnet.
findings.remediation: Cross-reference subnet-to-datacenter mapping.

findings.title: 145 middleware CIs with zero relationships
findings.description: Web/app servers and messaging middleware unconnected.
findings.remediation: Map middleware using Pathfinder.

findings.title: 1,200 servers with no backup relationship
findings.description: Backup coverage invisible.
findings.remediation: Map from backup management console.

findings.title: 42 duplicate serials across classes
findings.description: Same serial in different classes.
findings.remediation: Investigate and merge.

findings.title: 5,800 CIs missing assigned_to
findings.description: Individual assignment blank.
findings.remediation: Derive from support group.

findings.title: 4,800 CIs missing subcategory
findings.description: Limits hierarchical categorization.
findings.remediation: Derive from class and category.

findings.title: 620 CIs with hostname case inconsistencies
findings.description: Mixed case causes correlation failures.
findings.remediation: Standardize casing.

findings.title: 28 SSL certificates expired with no renewal
findings.description: Expired with no action tracked.
findings.remediation: Renew and implement lifecycle tracking.

findings.title: 3 monitoring tools not in CMDB
findings.description: Monitoring infrastructure itself not tracked.
findings.remediation: Create CIs for monitoring tools.

findings.title: 90 databases in wrong subclass
findings.description: MySQL as Oracle, PostgreSQL as SQL Server.
findings.remediation: Reclassify based on discovery.

findings.title: 22 load balancer CIs orphaned
findings.description: LB VIPs and pools have no relationships.
findings.remediation: Map pools and VIPs.

findings.title: 55 VMs with duplicate names
findings.description: VM names duplicated across clusters.
findings.remediation: Add cluster qualifier to IRE.

findings.title: 1,800 CIs with vendor but no contract
findings.description: Vendor populated but no contract referenced.
findings.remediation: Map contracts from procurement.

findings.title: 340 CIs with non-resolvable FQDN
findings.description: FQDN values cannot be resolved via DNS.
findings.remediation: Validate FQDNs against DNS.

findings.title: 220 hardware assets on vendor EOL list
findings.description: Hardware on EOL list but marked current.
findings.remediation: Flag EOL hardware.

findings.title: 2,400 switch ports with no device connection
findings.description: Switch port CIs don't show connections.
findings.remediation: Enable LLDP/CDP mapping.

findings.title: 160 cloud resources in generic server class
findings.description: Cloud CIs in wrong class.
findings.remediation: Migrate to cloud classes.

findings.title: 180 SSL certificate CIs orphaned
findings.description: No relationship to servers.
findings.remediation: Map certificates to servers.

findings.title: 980 CIs with blank install_status
findings.description: Critical lifecycle field blank.
findings.remediation: Derive from other status fields.

findings.title: 3,200 CIs missing IP version indicator
findings.description: No IPv4/IPv6/dual-stack indicator.
findings.remediation: Derive from IP format.

findings.title: 18 patch groups with no CI membership
findings.description: Patching scope empty.
findings.remediation: Map CIs to patch groups.

findings.title: 2 MID Servers reporting degraded health
findings.description: Discovery MID Servers degraded.
findings.remediation: Investigate MID Server health.

findings.title: 1,400 CIs where naming can't determine department
findings.description: No department code in names.
findings.remediation: Tag department via alternative methods.

findings.title: 24 duplicate location records
findings.description: Duplicate cmn_location entries.
findings.remediation: Merge duplicate locations.

findings.title: 8 container hosts with no pod relationships
findings.description: Kubernetes nodes without pod links.
findings.remediation: Integrate Kubernetes discovery.

findings.title: 6,200 CIs missing GL account
findings.description: GL account needed for financial reporting.
findings.remediation: Map from finance system.

findings.title: 450 CIs with descriptions exceeding 1000 chars
findings.description: May contain copy-pasted logs.
findings.remediation: Clean up long descriptions.

findings.title: No quarterly CMDB health review process
findings.description: No scheduled review cadence.
findings.remediation: Implement quarterly review.

findings.title: Test environment CIs have no prod counterpart
findings.description: Test/prod environments not mapped.
findings.remediation: Map test/prod pairs.

findings.title: 8 custom CI classes with zero instances
findings.description: Empty custom classes.
findings.remediation: Clean up unused classes.

findings.title: 340 DNS entry CIs orphaned
findings.description: DNS records not linked to hosts.
findings.remediation: Map DNS entries to servers.

findings.title: 28 apps with near-identical names
findings.description: Names differ only by spacing.
findings.remediation: Review and merge.

findings.title: All CIs missing last attestation date
findings.description: No attestation process exists.
findings.remediation: Implement attestation workflow.

findings.title: 180 CIs in wrong network segment
findings.description: IP-to-segment mismatch.
findings.remediation: Correct segment assignments.

findings.title: No tracking of CMDB API usage
findings.description: External integrations not tracked.
findings.remediation: Implement API monitoring.

findings.title: Only 30% of incidents have CI correlation
findings.description: Most incidents don't reference CIs.
findings.remediation: Enforce CI selection on incident form.

findings.title: 45 infra CIs using service CI classes
findings.description: Physical servers in service classes.
findings.remediation: Reclassify infrastructure CIs.

findings.title: 24 UPS CIs with no protected device
findings.description: UPS not linked to protected devices.
findings.remediation: Map UPS to devices and racks.

findings.title: 18 buildings with duplicate entries
findings.description: Address format differences.
findings.remediation: Standardize and merge.

findings.title: 14,000 CIs with no business justification
findings.description: Not documented.
findings.remediation: Low priority unless compliance required.

findings.title: 340 datacenter CIs with zero power data
findings.description: Power consumption blank or zero.
findings.remediation: Populate from PDU monitoring.

findings.title: 12 scheduled tasks pointing to deleted schedules
findings.description: Background tasks reference deleted schedules.
findings.remediation: Clean up orphaned tasks.

findings.title: 4 email servers with no user group relationships
findings.description: Email infra has no documented user base.
findings.remediation: Map email servers to user groups.

recommendations.title: Deploy Pathfinder for automated discovery and validation
recommendations.description: Cover all network segments with Pathfinder agents. This will address accuracy, currency, relationship, and orphan findings simultaneously.
recommendations.estimated_impact: Score increase: +30-40 points. Addresses 68% of critical findings.

recommendations.title: Implement CMDB deduplication rules
recommendations.description: Configure IRE identification and reconciliation rules to prevent new duplicates and identify existing ones.
recommendations.estimated_impact: Resolves 340 duplicate CIs. Prevents future duplicates.

recommendations.title: Establish CSDM foundation layers
recommendations.description: Define Business Services, Business Applications, and Technical Services. Map to infrastructure CIs.

recommendations.title: Clean up stale and retired CIs
recommendations.description: Audit and retire the 1,200+ CIs that haven't been updated in 180+ days.

recommendations.title: Populate missing required fields
recommendations.description: Bulk-update owner, support_group, environment, and location fields using derivation rules.

recommendations.title: Map Tier 1 application dependencies
recommendations.description: Priority engagement: map all Tier 1 application dependencies using Pathfinder behavioral observation.
recommendations.estimated_impact: Relationship score improvement for critical applications.

recommendations.title: Standardize CI classification
recommendations.description: Reclassify generic CIs into proper subclasses. Implement classification rules.

recommendations.title: Establish CMDB governance program
recommendations.description: Create governance board, appoint data stewards, define quality KPIs, and implement continuous monitoring.

maturity.label: Ad-hoc
next_level_requirements: Deploy automated discovery covering 40%+ of CIs

dimension_scores.details: 15,840 of 18,000 CIs have all required fields. Pathfinder auto-populated owner, environment, and location for 8,200 CIs.
Pathfinder confidence feed validating 6,400 CIs. 91% match rate between CMDB attributes and observed behavior.
98% of CIs updated in last 30 days via continuous Pathfinder observation. Only 45 CIs stale beyond 90 days.
382 integrations discovered (vs 120 documented). 156 relationships confirmed by traffic observation. 5,800 new relationships created.
Contour not yet deployed — 2 of 4 CSDM layers populated. Infrastructure and Technical Service layers in progress.
Pathfinder behavioral classification reclassified 810 generic CIs. Only 85 CIs remain in generic classes.
Orphaned CIs reduced from 4,100 to 680. Pathfinder auto-created relationships for 3,420 formerly orphaned CIs.
290 duplicates auto-resolved by CMDB Ops agents. 50 remain under review. IRE dedup rules now active.

findings.title: 34 shadow IT systems discovered (no CMDB record)
findings.description: Pathfinder observed 34 active hosts generating network traffic that have no corresponding CI in the CMDB. These are undocumented infrastructure assets.
findings.remediation: Create CI records for all discovered shadow IT. Investigate ownership and approval. Add to discovery scope.

findings.title: 89 ghost CIs identified (in CMDB but no observed traffic)
findings.description: 89 CIs are marked as Operational in the CMDB but Pathfinder has observed zero traffic in 30 days of monitoring. These are likely decommissioned assets.
findings.remediation: Validate each ghost CI. Retire confirmed decommissions. Investigate CIs that should have traffic.

findings.title: CSDM Business Service layer still not populated
findings.description: Business Services have not yet been defined. This requires business stakeholder engagement and is not automatable by Pathfinder alone.
findings.remediation: Conduct Business Service workshop. Deploy Contour for automated service model generation.

findings.title: CSDM Business Application layer still not populated
findings.description: Business Applications require organizational input that automated discovery cannot provide alone.
findings.remediation: Catalog business applications. Create CSDM Business Application CIs. Map to Technical Services.

findings.title: 12 undocumented external integrations carrying PHI data
findings.description: Pathfinder detected outbound data flows to external systems carrying patterns consistent with PHI. These integrations are not documented in the CMDB.
findings.remediation: Immediately document these integrations. Engage security and compliance teams. Verify BAA coverage.

findings.title: 8 CIs with critical behavioral class mismatch
findings.description: Pathfinder behavioral analysis shows these CIs behave as database servers but are classified as application servers. This affects backup, DR, and patching.
findings.remediation: Reclassify based on Pathfinder behavioral analysis. Update downstream workflows.

findings.title: 15 CIs marked Retired but actively serving traffic
findings.description: Pathfinder observes active traffic on CIs that are marked Retired in the CMDB. These systems are still in production use.
findings.remediation: Re-activate these CIs in CMDB. Investigate why they were marked Retired while still active.

findings.title: Critical EHR system has 6 undocumented database dependencies
findings.description: The Epic EHR application has 6 database connections that are not mapped in the CMDB. A failure in any of these could cause an EHR outage.
findings.remediation: Map all discovered dependencies immediately. Add to change management scope.

findings.title: CSDM Technical Service layer not populated
findings.description: Technical Services need to be defined to bridge infrastructure and business service layers.
findings.remediation: Generate Technical Services from Pathfinder-observed application clusters.

findings.title: 3,200 infrastructure CIs not mapped to any service
findings.description: While relationships have improved, 3,200 CIs still lack service context.
findings.remediation: Use Contour to generate service maps. Map infrastructure to Technical Services.

findings.title: 23 CIs misclassified based on behavioral analysis
findings.description: Pathfinder behavioral classification suggests 23 CIs are in the wrong class. Confidence > 85% for all.
findings.remediation: Review and accept Pathfinder reclassification recommendations.

findings.title: 42 CMDB relationships not confirmed by traffic observation
findings.description: These relationships exist in the CMDB but Pathfinder has not observed traffic between the endpoints in 30 days.
findings.remediation: Review unconfirmed relationships. Remove or flag stale relationships.

findings.title: 2,160 CIs still missing environment field
findings.description: Despite improvements, environment classification gaps remain for CIs outside Pathfinder agent coverage.
findings.remediation: Derive environment from subnet mapping for remaining CIs. Extend Pathfinder coverage.

findings.title: 3,400 CIs still missing cost center
findings.description: Cost center data requires organizational input beyond what automated discovery provides.
findings.remediation: Map cost centers from application ownership and department hierarchy.

findings.title: 15 CIs with Pathfinder confidence below 40%
findings.description: Pathfinder has low confidence in the accuracy of these CI records despite observing traffic.
findings.remediation: Investigate low-confidence CIs. Validate attributes against observed behavior.

findings.title: 680 orphaned CIs remaining after Pathfinder remediation
findings.description: These CIs remain orphaned despite Pathfinder observation. They may be in network segments not covered by agents.
findings.remediation: Extend Pathfinder agent coverage. Manually investigate CIs in uncovered segments.

findings.title: 50 duplicate candidates pending manual review
findings.description: IRE flagged 50 CI pairs as potential duplicates requiring human review.
findings.remediation: Review and merge confirmed duplicates. Tune IRE sensitivity thresholds.

findings.title: 18 newly discovered dependencies on Tier 1 applications
findings.description: Pathfinder discovered 18 previously unknown dependencies involving Tier 1 applications. These must be added to change management scope.
findings.remediation: Add dependencies to CMDB. Update change management CI associations.

findings.title: 156 relationships confirmed by traffic observation
findings.description: Pathfinder has confirmed 156 existing CMDB relationships by observing actual traffic between endpoints.
findings.remediation: No action needed. Relationships are validated. Update confidence scores.

findings.title: Service Offerings still not defined
findings.description: CSDM Service Offering layer remains empty. Requires service catalog alignment.
findings.remediation: Define Service Offerings aligned with service catalog. Map to Business Services.

findings.title: 4,200 CIs still missing criticality/tier assignment
findings.description: Criticality assignment requires business context that Pathfinder can inform but not fully automate.
findings.remediation: Derive criticality from observed traffic volume and dependency count. Business validation required.

findings.title: 380 CIs with non-standard vendor entries remaining
findings.description: Vendor normalization is 73% complete. 380 CIs still have non-standard vendor names.
findings.remediation: Complete vendor name normalization. Add new vendor patterns to transformation rules.

findings.title: 85 CIs still in generic cmdb_ci class
findings.description: These CIs could not be auto-classified. Manual review of their attributes is needed.
findings.remediation: Review unclassifiable CIs. May be data quality issues preventing classification.

findings.title: 45 CIs stale beyond 90 days despite Pathfinder
findings.description: These CIs are in network segments where Pathfinder agents could not be deployed (air-gapped or restricted).
findings.remediation: Establish manual validation schedule for air-gapped segments. Consider dedicated Pathfinder deployment.

findings.title: 1,200 CIs with no contract reference
findings.description: Contract associations require procurement system integration.
findings.remediation: Integrate with procurement/contract management system. Map CIs to contracts.

findings.title: 120 CIs showing attribute drift between discovery and Pathfinder
findings.description: Discovery and Pathfinder report different values for certain attributes. Reconciliation rules need tuning.
findings.remediation: Configure data source priority. Tune reconciliation rules for Pathfinder source.

findings.title: 340 orphaned software installation records remaining
findings.description: Software installations without host relationships, mostly from decommissioned servers.
findings.remediation: Clean up orphaned software records from retired hosts.

findings.title: 800 CIs without physical containment mapping
findings.description: Physical containment relationships are incomplete for datacenter assets.
findings.remediation: Import containment data from DCIM tools. Manual mapping for smaller sites.

findings.title: 1,800 hardware CIs still missing purchase date
findings.description: Purchase date requires procurement system integration.
findings.remediation: Integrate with procurement system for historical purchase data.

findings.title: CSDM lifecycle stages still not formally defined
findings.description: Lifecycle stage alignment requires governance decision.
findings.remediation: Define CSDM lifecycle stages in governance board.

findings.title: Container workloads still not tracked
findings.description: Kubernetes workloads remain outside CMDB scope.
findings.remediation: Phase 2 initiative: Kubernetes integration.

findings.title: DR pairs still not documented
findings.description: Disaster recovery relationships require manual documentation.
findings.remediation: Document DR pairs. Phase 2 priority.

findings.title: 120 CIs with timezone-location mismatch
findings.description: Timezone values don't match location for CIs in remote sites.
findings.remediation: Correct timezone based on location data. Low priority.

findings.title: CMDB governance board not yet established
findings.description: Governance structures need to be created to sustain improvements.
findings.remediation: Establish CMDB governance board. Define roles and meeting cadence.

findings.title: 5,200 CIs missing floor/room details
findings.description: Physical location detail below building level is sparse.
findings.remediation: Populate from facilities management system. Low priority.

findings.title: 18 soft-match duplicate candidates remaining
findings.description: Low-confidence duplicate matches requiring manual review.
findings.remediation: Review during next CMDB hygiene cycle.

findings.title: Medical IoT discovery partially deployed
findings.description: Pathfinder discovered some IoT devices but full medical device inventory is not yet in CMDB.
findings.remediation: Extend Pathfinder IoT discovery. Create medical device CI classes.

findings.title: 140 peripheral devices still orphaned
findings.description: Low-value peripherals without relationships.
findings.remediation: Map peripherals to workstations. Consider excluding from CMDB scope.

findings.title: CSDM target architecture not documented
findings.description: A formal CSDM roadmap is needed to guide remaining adoption.
findings.remediation: Create CSDM adoption roadmap with Contour deployment plan.

findings.title: 8% of CIs still have no discovery source
findings.description: 1,440 CIs remain without discovery source. Most are specialized or air-gapped assets.
findings.remediation: Tag with manual entry source. Schedule periodic validation.

findings.title: 12 SLAs still not linked to CIs
findings.description: Some SLA definitions remain unlinked to their protected services.
findings.remediation: Link SLAs to CIs and services.

findings.title: Patch level tracking still incomplete for 600 servers
findings.description: Patching tool integration is only partially deployed.
findings.remediation: Complete patching tool integration for remaining servers.

findings.title: 2,800 hardware CIs missing PO number
findings.description: Purchase order data requires procurement system integration.
findings.remediation: Phase 2: procurement system integration.

findings.title: IRE rules need tuning for 3 CI classes
findings.description: Dedup rules are producing false positives for cloud and VM CI classes.
findings.remediation: Tune IRE thresholds and identification criteria.

findings.title: 45 IP network CIs still orphaned
findings.description: Subnet CIs without gateway device relationships.
findings.remediation: Map to gateway devices during next network topology review.

findings.title: 85 CIs with Pathfinder confidence 40-60%
findings.description: Moderate confidence CIs that need additional observation time.
findings.remediation: Continue monitoring. Confidence scores typically improve over 60-90 day observation window.

findings.title: 1,440 CIs with no discovery_source
findings.description: Data provenance is unknown for these CIs.
findings.remediation: Tag as manually entered. Low priority.

findings.title: 8 custom CI classes with excessive inheritance depth
findings.description: Custom classes create complexity. Cleanup would simplify management.
findings.remediation: Review and flatten class hierarchy where possible.

findings.title: Only 62% of change requests reference affected CIs
findings.description: Improvement from 35% but still below target of 90%.
findings.remediation: Enforce CI association on change requests via mandatory field.

findings.title: Continuous health monitoring cadence not yet formalized
findings.description: Bearing is running assessments but a formal schedule is not established.
findings.remediation: Schedule monthly Bearing assessments. Set threshold alerts.

findings.title: 280 observed traffic patterns with no matching CMDB relationship
findings.description: Pathfinder sees communication between CI pairs that don't have a CMDB relationship.
findings.remediation: Review and create relationships for confirmed traffic patterns.

findings.title: 18 CIs showing workload pattern shift in last 7 days
findings.description: Pathfinder detects significant change in traffic patterns suggesting workload migration or change.
findings.remediation: Investigate workload shifts. May indicate unauthorized changes.

findings.title: 120 servers still running EOL operating systems
findings.description: Pathfinder confirmed these servers are actively running EOL OS versions.
findings.remediation: Prioritize OS migration for confirmed EOL servers.

findings.title: 980 hardware CIs still missing warranty info
findings.description: Warranty data requires vendor portal integration.
findings.remediation: Complete vendor warranty data import.

findings.title: 45 relationships showing asymmetric traffic
findings.description: Traffic flows one direction only despite bidirectional type.
findings.remediation: Review relationship types.

findings.title: 620 cloud CIs missing cost allocation tags
findings.description: Cloud resources lack FinOps tags.
findings.remediation: Apply cloud tagging policy.

findings.title: 8 CIs showing unusual network latency
findings.description: Latency anomalies suggest network path changes.
findings.remediation: Investigate network path changes.

findings.title: 3 API gateways with no consumers
findings.description: No consumer applications documented.
findings.remediation: Map from gateway logs.

findings.title: 1,800 servers with no backup policy
findings.description: Backup policy missing.
findings.remediation: Map from backup console.

findings.title: 85 CNAMEs pointing to non-existent targets
findings.description: CNAME targets don't resolve.
findings.remediation: Clean up stale DNS.

findings.title: 24 CIs using deprecated TLS 1.0/1.1
findings.description: Deprecated protocol usage detected.
findings.remediation: Upgrade TLS versions.

findings.title: No formal CMDB change log for stakeholders
findings.description: Changes not communicated.
findings.remediation: Implement CMDB dashboard.

recommendations.title: Deploy Contour for CSDM service model generation
recommendations.description: Business Service and Business Application layers are the biggest remaining gaps. Contour automates Technical Service generation.

recommendations.title: Address shadow IT and PHI integration findings
recommendations.description: 34 shadow IT systems and 12 undocumented PHI integrations are compliance risks requiring immediate attention.

recommendations.title: Establish CMDB governance board
recommendations.description: Formalize data stewardship, quality KPIs, and review cadence to sustain improvements.

recommendations.title: Extend Pathfinder to remaining network segments
recommendations.description: 680 orphaned CIs and 45 stale CIs are in segments without Pathfinder coverage.

recommendations.title: Complete vendor and contract data normalization
recommendations.description: Finish vendor name standardization and procurement system integration.

recommendations.title: Schedule continuous Bearing assessments
recommendations.description: Formalize monthly health assessment cadence with trend tracking and threshold alerts.
recommendations.estimated_impact: Early detection of data quality regression.

maturity.label: Defined
criteria_met: Confidence scores on CIs via Pathfinder
next_level_requirements: Deploy Contour for full CSDM coverage
Achieve health score of 75+ sustained for 90 days

Redis RESP protocol traffic, cache-pattern access with high read/write ratio, pub/sub messaging observed
